_comment: HAND-REVIEWED accept-either overlay (Solo todo 809). NOT generated — edit by hand; survives `node eval/compile-routing.mjs` because run-routing.mjs applies it at load time. Each id is an existing routing-cases.json case whose question is genuinely procedural/build-shaped (how-do-I, walk-me-through, scaffold/deploy/integrate) and whose corpus label is stellarDocs, but where a mirrored skill (stellar-dev smart-contracts/dapp/data/assets + openzeppelin-stellar) covers the same procedure — so a skills hit is not a routing mistake. run-routing applies expected_any to these cases and reports BOTH gradings: strict legacy (expected_service only, unchanged) and accept-either (any service in expected_any). Reviewed question-by-question, precision over recall: what-is / which-SEP / lookup / comparison questions are deliberately excluded, and every included id was checked against actual skill content (grep of ecosystem-skills/skills/).
